metadata.name: zse
metadata.summary: A CLI tool that allows UNSW students to submit work to CSE machines.

modules.name: main
documentation:
Progam that allows file upload to UNSW CSE machines
Useful for autotests and lab submissions

functions.name: main.main
documentation: Main function for program

functions.name: main.setup_argparse
documentation: Setups argparse to read and output the result of arguments

functions.name: main.check_configs
documentation: Checks if a config file has been setup

functions.name: main.create_config
documentation: Creates a config file if it doesnt exist

functions.name: main.ssh_connect
documentation: Sets up SSH connection

functions.name: main.read_command
documentation: Reads the user command, and directs to correct function

functions.name: main.execute_user_command
documentation: Executes the user's command in the remote shell (for non pipe option)

functions.name: main.upload_and_run
documentation: Uploads local files and runs user command

functions.name: main.run_and_donwload
documentation: Runs remote command and downloads files from dir

functions.name: main.read_terminal
documentation: Reads stdout and stderr of program in semi real time

functions.name: main.download_dir
documentation: Recursively download remote directories and their files.

functions.name: main.handle_file
documentation: Handles downloading a single file and optionally clearing it.

functions.name: main.should_ignore
documentation: Helper function to determine what files/foldes to ignore when syncing

functions.name: main.sftp_recursive_put
documentation: Recursively looks through direcotries to find files to sync

functions.name: main.ssh_mirror
documentation:
Pipe function that acts like an ssh console
Currently a WIP
THIS IS A WIP - MAY EVENTUALLY REMOVE

functions.name: main.print_err_msg
documentation: Helper function that prints error messages

functions.name: main.create_status_printer
documentation: Helper function to generate satus messages

classes.name: main.Error
documentation: Enum for error types

classes.name: main.Status
documentation: Enum for satus types
